identity.name: ITDR — Session Token Replay Across Geo / User-Agent
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-ITDR-004. Plane: ITDR. Primary technique: T1539. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-ITDR-004. Plane: ITDR. Primary technique: T1539. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-ITDR-004.
UC: Stolen Session-Token Detection / TC: Same Session Token Used From Two Distinct Geos / Browsers Within 5 min.

techniques.name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Web Session Cookie

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-ITDR-004 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm token_replay pattern is supported
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe idp_signin_emulator \
  | jq -e '.eal_targets'
# step-2: Issue token from US-West Chrome, replay from EU-Central curl
: "${COLLECTOR_URL:=https://collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid/idp/events}"
: "${COLLECTOR_HOST:=collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid}"
cat > /tmp/itdr-004.yml <<YML
campaign_id: CMP-ITDR-004
name: "ITDR — Okta token replay"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - "$COLLECTOR_HOST"
dry_run: false
tags: [itdr, okta, token-replay]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: idp_signin_emulator
    params:
      collector_url: "$COLLECTOR_URL"
      provider: okta
      event_pattern: token_replay
      target_user: "ada.lovelace@cortexsim-canary.invalid"
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/itdr-004.yml --live
# step-3: Replay 3 iterations to confirm rule deterministically fires
: "${COLLECTOR_URL:=https://collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid/idp/events}"
: "${COLLECTOR_HOST:=collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid}"
cat > /tmp/itdr-004-rep.yml <<YML
campaign_id: CMP-ITDR-004
name: "ITDR — Okta token replay repeat"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - "$COLLECTOR_HOST"
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: idp_signin_emulator
    params:
      collector_url: "$COLLECTOR_URL"
      provider: okta
      event_pattern: token_replay
      target_user: "ada.lovelace@cortexsim-canary.invalid"
      iterations: 3
      sleep_seconds: 10
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/itdr-004-rep.yml --live
